headline: Applied Optoelectronics' 800G Ramp: Key Catalyst to Aid 2026 Growth
summary: AAOI targets $1B+ revenues by 2026, as AI-driven 800G demand ramps, but capacity, supply chain and staffing will dictate how hyperscaler orders convert to sales.
